allow: Bash("C:\\Users\\zeyad\\Documents\\the-dispatch\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "import flask, flask_sqlalchemy, flask_cors, dotenv; print\('deps ok'\)")

PowerShell($base = "http://localhost:5001"; $routes = @\("/api/players", "/leaderboard", "/vtc", "/"\); foreach \($r in $routes\) { try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base$r" -MaximumRedirection 0 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "$r  ->  $\($resp.StatusCode\)" } catch { $code = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; Write-Output "$r  ->  $code" } })

PowerShell($base = "http://localhost:5001"; $routes = @\("/", "/api/players", "/leaderboard", "/leaderboard?sort=jobs", "/leaderboard?sort=earnings", "/vtc", "/auth/login"\); foreach \($r in $routes\) { try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base$r" -MaximumRedirection 0 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "$r  ->  $\($resp.StatusCode\)" } catch { "$r  ->  $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" } })
